name: Efrat Rabinovich's Potato Pancakes with Apple
recipeInstructions:
"EFRAT RABINOVICH'S POTATO PANCAKES WITH APPLES"
1. Grate the potatoes and apple into a mixing bowl, working quickly to avoid discoloration. Squeeze out any accumulated liquid.
2. Add the egg, flour, salt, and pepper to taste. Mix thoroughly.
3. Heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Drop in batter using 3 tablespoons per pancake and flatten slightly with a spatula.
5. Fry for 3 to 4 minutes on the first side until browned, then flip the pancakes and cook for another 3 to 4 minutes on the second side until browned.
6. Drain on paper towels.
7. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and serve. Makes 10 (3-inch) pancakes.
Each pancake contains about: 68 calories; 38 mg sodium; 21 mg cholesterol; 2 grams fat; 12 grams carbohydrates; 2 grams protein; 0.26 gram fiber.
